headline: How elevator operator Otis is capitalizing on the AI boom
summary: Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi welcomes Otis Worldwide Corporation (OTIS) CEO Judy Marks on Opening Bid. Marks reveals how the 150+ year-old elevator brand is shifting with the times and surging alongside the boom in AI data center projects.

headline: Caterpillar is Set to Report Q1 Earnings: Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
summary: CAT heads into Q1 earnings with rising revenue and EPS estimates, but higher costs and premium valuation make the near-term investment case less straightforward.

headline: The Nasdaq Composite Jolted by OpenAI Stumble, Rising Oil Even as Tech Earnings Ramp Up
summary: The Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) is down sharply to start the session, giving back yesterday’s record-setting gains. A Wall Street Journal report revealed that OpenAI fell short of its 2026 sales and user targets rattled the AI infrastructure trade ahead of megacap earnings. For the month of April, the Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) is on pace for ... The Nasdaq Composite Jolted by OpenAI Stumble, Rising Oil Even as Tech Earnings Ramp Up

headline: OpenAI-Linked Stocks Slump on Report It Missed Key Targets
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shares in OpenAI partners such as SoftBank Group Corp. and Oracle Corp. slumped after the Wall Street Journal reported that the artificial intelligence startup recently failed to meet targets for sales and new users, reviving worries about spending ahead of tech earnings. headline: NBIM CEO: Outlook very uncertain
summary: Nicolai Tangen is the CEO of NBIM, which manages Norway’s bumper $2 trillion sovereign wealth fund. Tangen discusses the market consequences from the Middle East conflict, and why he believes it is a good time to be in index funds.
